description: Build a polished e-textbook design system with KaTeX math rendering, theorem/definition/callout boxes, step-reveal containers, vocabulary highlights, and responsive lesson layout
deviation_notes: Plan grew from 14 to 18 tasks: Phase 2 added ExampleHeader (not in original estimate); Phase 3 added TableOfValues, DiscoursePrompt, ReflectionCard as separate tasks. All additional tasks were in scope per spec.
